title: Aehr Test Systems Q4 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Aehr Test Systems held its fiscal year 2023 Q4 earnings call, reporting record full-year financial performance. The company achieved record revenues of $65 million, up 28% year-over-year, and non-GAAP net income increased 62% to $17.3 million for the full year. Q4 2023 results showed EPS of $0.21, meeting consensus expectations. The company posted record GAAP gross margin of 50.4%, up 390 basis points from the prior year. Management highlighted strong momentum across multiple markets, particularly silicon carbide systems for electric vehicles and emerging opportunities in AI-related semiconductor testing. The company guided for fiscal 2024 revenue to be greater than $65 million with continued profitability.
